name: sp-ark-plugins
description: AI agent skills for sp-ARK startup accelerator operations

plugins.name: sp-ark-ceo-tools
plugins.description: Excel/SharePoint write access and Outlook read-write for the sp-ARK Labs CEO via delegated Microsoft OAuth.

plugins.name: sp-ark-community
plugins.description: Compiles expense reports and manages community engagement for sp-ARK accelerator programs.

plugins.name: sp-ark-marketing
plugins.description: Scrapes the CEO's inbox to build a contact database and drafts personalized event invitations.

plugins.name: sp-ark-operations
plugins.description: Onboards new sp-ARK Labs members across agreements, access control, member portal access, and Slack.
